OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

OPENTIP_MAX_TLP.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level to apply on objects imported into OpenCTI. Available values: TLP:CLEAR, TLP:GREEN, TLP:AMBER, TLP:AMBER+STRICT, TLP:RED

OPENTIP_REPLACE_WITH_LOWER_SCORE.description: Whether to keep the higher of the OpenTIP or existing score (false) or force the score to be updated with the OpenTIP score even if its lower than existing score (true).

OPENTIP_FILE_CREATE_NOTE_FULL_REPORT.description: Whether or not to include the full report as a Note.

OPENTIP_FILE_UPLOAD_UNSEEN_ARTIFACTS.description: Whether to upload artifacts that OpenTIP has no record of (not supported by OpenTIP).

OPENTIP_IP_ADD_RELATIONSHIPS.description: Whether or not to add ASN and location resolution relationships.

OPENTIP_DOMAIN_ADD_RELATIONSHIPS.description: Whether or not to add IP resolution relationships.

OPENTIP_URL_UPLOAD_UNSEEN.description: Whether to upload URLs that OpenTIP has no record of (not supported by OpenTIP).

OPENTIP_INCLUDE_ATTRIBUTES_IN_NOTE.description: Whether or not to include the attributes info in Note.

OPENTIP_ADD_CATEGORIES_LABELS.description: Whether or not to add category labels to observables.

OPENTIP_ADD_ZONE_LABELS.description: Whether or not to add zone labels to observables.

OPENTIP_INDICATOR_ZONES.description: Zones that trigger indicator creation for all observable types. Available values: Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Grey
